defaultModelPanel.title: Models & Prompts
defaultModelPanel.description: Configure the default models and global prompts used by chat, image generation, transcription, and translation tasks
defaultModelPanel.conversationModelDesc: Used when creating new topics and assistants
defaultModelPanel.imageModelDesc: Preselected when creating a new painting
defaultModelPanel.transcriptionModelDesc: Used to transcribe audio attachments before sending them into chat
defaultModelPanel.ocrModelDesc: Vision chat model used to extract text from web screenshots
defaultModelPanel.speechModelDesc: Used when manually reading assistant messages aloud
defaultModelPanel.speechVoiceDesc: Voice identifier passed to speech-api. Leave empty to use the provider default voice.
defaultModelPanel.topicNamingModelDesc: Used to automatically generate topic titles
defaultModelPanel.globalChatPromptDesc: Always prepended before the assistant prompt on every chat request
defaultModelPanel.globalChatPromptPlaceholder: Enter the global chat prompt that should be prepended to every conversation…
defaultModelPanel.globalImagePromptDesc: Prepended before the current painting prompt for every image generation request
defaultModelPanel.globalImagePromptPlaceholder: Enter the global image prompt prefix for every painting request…
defaultModelPanel.noModels: No available models. Please add models in Model Manager first.
